channel.title: FormattedAI — Articles
channel.description: Guides and tips about webdev tools, image optimization, SEO, GEO and text formatting.

item.title: Pasting ChatGPT Text into Google Docs? You're Losing All Formatting — Here's the Fix
item.author: adam.szczotka0@gmail.com (Adam Szczotka)
item.description: ChatGPT generates Markdown, but Google Docs doesn't understand it. Markdown Formatter translates one format to the other — one click, 100% in browser.

item.title: Free PDF Tools Online — 7 Features in One, No File Uploads
item.author: adam.szczotka0@gmail.com (Adam Szczotka)
item.description: Merge, split, compress, crop PDF, convert images, fill forms and add signatures — all in your browser.

item.title: GEO — How to Optimize Your Website for AI Search Engines? 2026 Guide
item.author: adam.szczotka0@gmail.com (Adam Szczotka)
item.description: Generative Engine Optimization — how to make your website appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity and Gemini answers. With code examples.

item.title: How to Speed Up Image Loading on Your Website? Complete AVIF Guide
item.author: adam.szczotka0@gmail.com (Adam Szczotka)
item.description: Learn why AVIF is the best image format in 2026 and how to convert images without losing quality.
